Description: Inventory of physical and digital assets
Identities proofed and bound to credentials
Least privilege and separation of duties
Policy and regulations regarding physical operating environment
Maintenance and repair performed and logged
Access to systems restricted to authorized users/systems
Detected events analyzed for attack targets
Event data collected from multiple sources
Monitoring for unauthorized personnel and activities
Roles and responsibilities for detection defined
Response plan executed during or after an incident
Personnel know their roles during incident
Recovery plan executed during or after incident
